title: Iranian media (Tasnim): US offered temporary oil sanctions waiver until final agreement reached
snippet: Iran's semi-official Tasnim news agency reported, citing a source close to the negotiation team, that the US proposed a temporary waiver of sanctions on Iran's oil — a key demand by Tehran to agree to a peace deal and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The waiver would be in place until a final agreement is achieved. The US has not confirmed the offer. This report caused oil prices to drop significantly from $111 toward $102.
tag_reason: 신규 — 미국의 임시 제재 유예 제안은 이전 보도에 없던 새로운 협상 카드
